title: Problem with prepared statements
poc: select * from t1 where 'a' member of (c1 -> '$');
prepare s1 from "select * from t1 where ? member of (c1 -> '$')";
key_bug_features: Errors with prepared statements after MySQL 8.0.22 upgrade
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t2(c1 JSON, c2 INT NOT NULL, c3 VARCHAR(255));
PREPARE stmt FROM 'SELECT * FROM t2 WHERE ? MEMBER OF (c1 -> ''$'')';
